Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1083 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 15207 0 0}Ah, {f 4 1}. I've been waiting for you... Okay, not really.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1083 0 -1 -1 0 0}I looked and looked, but there's nothing at my house that's not related to Masamune.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1083 0 -1 -1 0 0}This didn't belong to Masamune personally, but it still has ties to him, so...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1083 0 -1 -1 0 0}Do you really need this? Maybe you've... reconsidered?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1083 0 -1 -1 0 0}Not that I'm reluctant at all to give it to you, of course.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1083 0 -1 -1 0 0}You'll take good care of it, right!? It'll become a family heirloom, right!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Mr. Ono gave me his (ITEM NAME).[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1083 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 15222 0 0}You must be proud, {f 4 1}. You've got a family heirloom now.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1083 0 -1 -1 0 0}Yeah, I guess this is how it should be...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1083 0 -1 -1 0 0}Well, I've still got a few of those left at home.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1083 0 -1 -1 0 0}This is the second time I've given a helm to a student, after all.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1083 0 -1 -1 0 0}That Bebe... Do you know him? He's an exchange student in my class.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1083 0 -1 -1 0 0}Back in the spring, when he first came here, he admired it so much that I let him have it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1083 0 -1 -1 0 0}It does my heart good to see the samurai spirit is still alive in you kids, even those from a foreign country.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1083 0 -1 -1 0 0}It must be because the glorious lives of the Sengoku generals transcend history...![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1083 0 -1 -1 0 0}Masamune Date, for example. The amazing thing about him is that he...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I enjoyed even more[n]stories about Masamune.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I have a deeper understanding of history...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I managed to obtain a helm from Mr. Ono.[n]{f 1 1}
